docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,396.00 FILED BY HAMAMURA, SARAH AS TO DEFENDANT TAMAYO, RODRIGO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-05-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-05-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-05-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF SARAH HAMAMURA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT RODRIGO TAMAYO IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
DECLARATION OF CURRENT ADDRESS (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY DEFENDANT TAMAYO, RODRIGO
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-05-2022 - JUDGMENT.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HAMAMURA, SARAH IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT TAMAYO, RODRIGO STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
